text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, we're already back at the academy! Today
went by in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Isn't that... Air Groove? It looks like she's heading
our way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What if she's found out that it was me who placed
the whoopee cushions in the student council
office?!
choice_data_list: What did you do that for?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Don't get the wrong idea! It was a spell! If
successful, it's supposed to give you courage!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Still, I can't have her finding out the truth! If she
does, the spell becomes a curse!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Nay! Divine Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I entrust this life of mine into your care! Please do
well by me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having said that, Matikanefukukitaru quickly
darts away, hiding out of sight.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Where did Fukukitaru get off to? I swear I just
saw her over here...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Is that so... Then, could you pass on this message
for me?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'd prefer to tell her in person, but I have an
emergency meeting to get to. I'm afraid I can't
spare the time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Please tell her I said... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This morning at the dorm, she forced this hole
punch into my hands with all this talk that it was
my lucky item.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I wasn't sure I believed in
fortune-telling, but thanks to her, I was able to
prepare for my upcoming meeting effectively.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That being said, her usual reckless behavior is not
acceptable. She shouldn't get carried away.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Tell her that for me too.
choice_data_list: ...And that's what Air Groove had to say.
...And that's what Air Groove had to say.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wahhh! I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Having someone validate my divinations... It's like
I'm being validated too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I know why this happened...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's because I put myself at risk placing all those
whoopee cushions! I'm sure of it!
choice_data_list: Try not to overdo it, okay?
Try not to overdo it, okay?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Sure! I don't really understand what you mean,
but I'll try not to!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Well, she's on her way to retrieve the whoopee
cushions at least.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Over there?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gah! You traitooor!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's with the attitude? I'm only here to
thank you for this morning.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Thank me? Oh, are you talking about the
lucky item?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right. Thanks to that hole punch you
gave me—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so that's what it was! I thought you found out
that it was me who planted all the whoopee
cushions last week!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh? So that was your doing?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oops...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Why don't the two of us go to the student council
office now so everyone can... thank you... for you
contributions?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Arghh! Someone save meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accompany Matikanefukukitaru to accept
everyone's "thanks."
